title: AABB — do two boxes overlap?
blurb: The bread-and-butter check: catching a pickup, a hit, an overlap. Uses the SDK collision module (Rect + collideRect).

title: AABB with push-out (overlap depth)
blurb: Not just "do they touch" but "how deep", so you can push a mover out of a wall or platform along the smaller axis.

title: Tile collision (a box vs the map)
blurb: Is a mover hitting a solid tile in a collision map? Checks all four corners — the standard platformer/top-down ground test.
